title: Come On Over (25th Anniversary Diamond Edition)
notes:
Walmart exclusive on two 180-gram solid Red vinyl discs, housed in a gatefold cover sleeve.

Hype sticker reads:
"25th Anniversary Diamond Edition
The top-selling country album and highest-sold female album of all time!
Remastered from the original analog tapes for the first time!
Pressed on 2 x 180-gram red vinyl!
B0037898-01"
